name: Spicy Apricot Oat Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, and pumpkin pie spice into a large mixing bowl.
2. Stir in oats, apricots, and walnuts.
3. In a small bowl, combine eggs, milk, and oil; blend well.
4. Add the egg mixture to the dry ingredients and stir until just moistened.
5. Spoon batter into greased 3-inch muffin pan cups, filling each cup about 2/3 full.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes or until golden brown.
7. Serve hot with butter and homemade jam or jelly.
